session.task: Improve stats banner clarity, add workspace filter, make traces clickable, fix agent mode display

events.reason: Issues identified: 1) '44/50 Agent Mode' is confusing — it shows agent+multitask sessions out of loaded count, not meaningful. Replace with mode breakdown. 2) Stats like 'Lines Touched' only reflect the 50 loaded sessions, not total — needs clarification. 3) Traces stat should link to /traces page. 4) Need workspace/project filter dropdown in the header to scope the board.

Rewrote StatsBanner: replaced confusing '44/50 Agent Mode' with clear mode breakdown (e.g. '38A / 6M / 6C' for Agent/Multi/Chat). Added 'Total Sessions' showing full count with '50 loaded' sublabel. Made Traces stat a clickable Link to /traces. Added workspace dropdown filter in the header that filters by project name. Clarified 'Lines Touched' is across loaded sessions.
